reasoning: Adjacently correct direction (article reads Lean Right), but the model relied on outlet reputation and vague/attributed content instead of the author’s prose, and used an overconfident 0.95 despite subtle bias signals.

custom_reasoning.classification_accuracy: Labelled Right; article is better read as Lean Right due to selection/framing and embedded promo copy, so within one class.
custom_reasoning.confidence_calibration: 0.95 is far too high for a mostly neutral, quote-driven piece with modest structural lean signals.
custom_reasoning.reasoning_evidence_quality: Evidence hinges on outlet identity and generalized/attributed statements rather than specific authorial prose; only the promo content indicator was grounded in the text.
